one_time_description: Nlaka'pamux Legacy Trust one-time payment of $400,000 received during the year
economic_notes: First Nation holds 17.9% interest in Nlaka'pamux Resources Limited Partnership and 12.5% interest in K'en T'em Limited Partnership, both established for commercial economic development opportunities. Also operates Bear Essentials Gas Bar.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021, not 2024. No schedule of remuneration for chief/council/staff disclosed. Two GBEs accounted for under modified equity method: Nlaka'pamux Resources Limited Partnership (17.9%) and K'en T'em Limited Partnership (12.5%). A $400,000 contribution was made to K'en T'em LP during the year, also a $400,000 Nlaka'pamux Legacy Trust receipt is treated as one-time. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($1,075,802) + CMHC ($34,376) + First Nation Health Authority ($12,560) + Fraser Thompson Indian Services Society ($212,753) + Province of BC ($106,337) + FNESC ($39,940) + New Relationship Trust ($9,900) + ISC recoveries (-$35,058) + Sto:lo Nation ($9,936) + Nlaka'pamux Nation Tribal Council ($16,530) + Hell's Gate Reserve Claim ($19,866) = $1,502,942 from identifiable government sources; OSR includes investment income, store/campsite, property tax, earnings from GBEs, rental, interest, and other. Segmented ISC total ($1,075,802) differs from statement of operations ISC line ($1,110,860) due to recoveries netting.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
